caption: A person holds a graded baseball card in a clear protective plastic case, showcasing a player in a batting stance. The background features a desk with white boxes and a blue and white banner. In the first frame, the card is tilted, while in the subsequent frames, it is held upright and centered. A small inset video in the lower right corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap, watching the card. On-screen graphics include the text "CASEBREAKS.COM" and a larger "BREAK" logo at the bottom of the screen. The cards are identified by a label that reads "TBD-MLB." As the sequence progresses, the person shifts their grip on the case to better display the card's front face to the camera.
